title: SLA Management
description: Build a customizable SLA management system with AI and NocoBase. Connect coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode to NocoBase and use natural language to generate SLA monitoring dashboards, at-risk tickets, breach alerts, response deadlines, resolution deadlines, priority analysis, and attainment statistics — not just a prototype, but a customizable, reliable, continuously evolvable service-level management system.
description_cn: 使用 AI 和 NocoBase 搭建可定制的 SLA 管理系统。将 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor、OpenCode 等 Coding Agent 接入 NocoBase 后，可用自然语言生成 SLA 监控看板、高风险工单、违约提醒、响应时限、解决时限、优先级分析和达成率统计，不只是生成原型，而是构建可定制、可靠、可长期迭代的服务等级管理系统。
author: NocoBase Team
prompt: Build a NocoBase app — SLA Monitor: a KPI bar, a three-column war-room board, and countdown rings. Match the layout and signature visuals of this reference prototype: https://static-docs.nocobase.com/solution/templates/17-sla-management.html
